channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: WNBA Finals reach Game 5 for first time since 2019, Liberty head back to New York
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It's fitting that a record-breaking season for the WNBA would come down to a winner-take-all Game 5 of its Finals. For the first time since 2019, the league championship will go the distance. This one will be in New York on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Jaguars come back from double-digit deficit over Patriots thanks to Tank Bigsby's career game in London
item.description: Tank Bigsby ran for 118 yards and two touchdowns as the Jacksonville Jaguars fought back from a 10-point deficit to beat the New England Patriots in London.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes offensive struggles continue in 13-7 loss to TCU
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team hit a new low Saturday night, with an extremely disappointing 13-7 loss to TCU at Rice-Eccles Stadium. The offense managed just one touchdown, while freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson was sacked four times.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Patriots rookie QB Drake Maye floats theory on why NFL fans in UK should support his team
item.description: The rookie QB presented an argument which appeared to be directed at football fans based in the United Kingdom who might be on the fence about which NFL team they should back.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lynx force Game 5 of WNBA Finals on Carleton's free throws to beat Liberty 82-80
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Bridget Carleton made two free throws with 2 seconds left, and the Minnesota Lynx forced a decisive Game 5 of the WNBA Finals, beating the New York Liberty 82-80 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Kadary Richmond talks expectations for senior season at St. John's
item.description: QUEENS, N.Y. (PIX11) – Kadary Richmond helped lead Seton Hall to an NIT Championship last season. He is now getting ready for his final year in the Big East, but this season he is suiting up to play for Rick Pitino at St. John’s. Watch the video player for more on this story.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Guardians starting Tanner Bibee in Game 5 against Yankees after short outing earlier in ALCS
item.description: Tanner Bibee is getting a second crack at the Yankees in the AL Championship Series. His first one didn't go so well. The right-hander will start for the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 on Saturday after he was pulled from Game 2 in the second inning by manager Stephen Vogt.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Rowdies move to IMG Academy for final 2 regular-season games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Rowdies will play their final two regular-season matches at IMG Academy due to the impacts of Hurricane Milton and Helene.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Former NFL quarterback Jay Cutler arrested on DUI, gun charges
item.description: The former Bears and Broncos quarterback Jwas arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, Fox 5

item.title: Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler arrested for DUI, gun charge
item.description: FRANKLIN, Tenn. — Former Bears quarterback Jay Cutler was arrested Thursday in Tennessee for allegedly driving intoxicated. Officers responded to the 200 block of Bridge Street at around 5 p.m. in Franklin, Tennessee on the report of a minor traffic collision involving two vehicles.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, ABC 4

item.title: Broncos dominate Saints in Payton's return to New Orleans
item.description: For all four quarters. For all 60 minutes. The Denver Broncos were in complete control of the Saints.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Anaheim knocks off Utah in overtime, 5-4
item.description: ANAHEIM, Calif. (AP) - After winning two overtime games to begin its first road trip, the Utah Hockey Club closed out the trip with an overtime loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Virginia McCaskey named Top 25 candidate in "Contributor" category for Pro Football HoF's Class of 2025
item.description: CANTON, Ohio (WGN) — Virginia McCaskey has been named one of 25 candidates for the "Contributor" category in the Pro Football Hall of Fame's Class of 2025.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Former SJSU basketball standout found dead in Romania
item.description: (KRON) -- Former San Jose State University Women's Basketball standout Tyra Whitehead has passed away, according to a social media post from SJSU Women's Basketball. Whitehead was a forward who went on to become a WNBA prospect with the Washington Mystics.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Denver Broncos at New Orleans Saints: TV channel, time, what to know
item.description: The Denver Broncos face the New Orleans Saints on the road for Thursday Night Football; an anticipated match against coach Sean Payton's former team.
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Donnell, ABC 4

item.title: Injured Alex Cobb dropped from Guardians' ALCS roster, replaced by Ben Lively
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Pitcher Alex Cobb was dropped from Cleveland's American League Championship Series roster on Tuesday after he got hurt yet again in the opener, leaving the Guardians in search of a Game 5 starter against the New York Yankees. “It’s been a challenging year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kucherov gets 4th goal of the season, Lightning beat Canucks 4-1 in Milton-delayed home opener
item.description: Nikita Kucherov scored his fourth goal of the season, and the Tampa Bay Lightning defeated the Vancouver Canucks in their hurricane-delayed home opener on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tom Brady's purchase of a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders is approved by NFL team owners
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Tom Brady has another new role in the NFL: owner. The seven-time Super Bowl champion purchased a minority stake in the Las Vegas Raiders, a deal unanimously approved by NFL team owners on Tuesday at the league's annual fall meeting.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Bears vs Commanders flexed to later time slot: NFL
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — The Chicago Bears Week 8 game at the Washington Commanders has been flexed to the late afternoon window, according to a press release from the NFL League Office. The NFL announced Tuesday the Bears’ Week 8 road matchup against the Commanders has been flexed to 3:25 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU hopes to finish strong after 6-0 start
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - From being picked 13th in the Big 12 Conference, to be ranked 13th in the nation, BYU is off to a 6-0 start for just the sixth time in school history without any superstars or sure-fire NFL prospects. In fact, 16 different players have scored touchdowns this year.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: New Jersey hands Utah its first loss, 3-0
item.description: NEWARK, N.J. (ABC4 Sports) - After scoring an NHL-leading 16 goals through the first three games of the season, the Utah Hockey Club had a devil of a time scoring at New Jersey.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Column: Caleb Williams has arrived and the Bears are a playoff team
item.description: Caleb Williams has shown impressive improvement in his first six games with the Chicago Bears, leading the team to three straight wins and a potential playoff berth.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Aidan Hutchinson likely down 4-6 months with broken leg, Lions coach Dan Campbell says
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Aidan Hutchinson is likely done playing this year because of the leg injury he sustained against the Cowboys, but surgery to repair his fractured tibia and fibula “went great” and Lions coach Dan Campbell said Monday he isn't ready to declare his star pass rusher out for the
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Los Angeles Rams implementing new AI technology during football games
item.description: The technologically advanced home of the Los Angeles Rams is about to have a new way for fans to track players’ statistics from their seats during the game.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Los Angeles Clippers to make Intuit Dome debut Monday
item.description: For the first time in one quarter of a century, the Los Angeles Clippers will play a home game in their own, exclusive arena on Monday night. That's because the Intuit Dome, the $2 billion Inglewood arena, is now open seven years after it was first announced to be in the works.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Tampa Bay Lightning donates tickets to first responders; offers discounted tickets for first 3 home games
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning donated tickets to hundreds of first responders, other recovery workers, and their families following the aftermath of Hurricane Helene and Milton.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC
